title: Checkout outage for all users
body: Payment failing with 500 errors in production. Customers cannot complete purchases.

title: Possible SQL injection in search endpoint
body: A researcher reports a vulnerability and shared exploit steps for the public API.

title: OAuth quickstart example is confusing
body: The docs show an outdated callback URL and the tutorial does not mention SSO setup.

title: Feature request: export audit logs to CSV
body: Compliance team would like scheduled exports and support for filtering by workspace.
